zh: Mezz 最经典的旗舰竞技产品线
WX700 十片拼接前节，低偏转与手感兼得
Wavy Joint 波浪接牙，传力更均匀
日式精工，制造公差极小
多种珍贵木材选择，外观素雅大方
en: Mezz's most iconic flagship competition line
WX700 10-piece spliced shaft balances low deflection with feel
Wavy Joint for more uniform power transfer
Japanese precision with minimal manufacturing tolerance
Multiple exotic wood options with elegant aesthetics

suitable_for.zh: 中高级竞技选手，偏好木质前节手感、追求极致做工品质的球手。在亚洲职业圈使用率极高。
suitable_for.en: Intermediate to advanced competitive players who prefer wood shaft feel and demand the highest build quality. Extremely popular among Asian professional players.

review.zh: EC7 是 Mezz 的招牌系列，也是品牌在亚洲市场统治力的核心产品。与 Predator 追求极致低偏转不同，Mezz EC7 更强调'手感'与'低偏转'的平衡——WX700 前节虽然偏转数据不如 REVO，但反馈感更自然、更接近传统木杆的击球体验。后把做工极其精细，接缝处理近乎完美，配色素雅不张扬，很符合亚洲审美。Wavy Joint 的设计让接牙处的力量传递更加连贯，整体手感非常'一体化'。唯一缺点是价格偏高，性价比不如 Predator Sport 系列。
review.en: The EC7 is Mezz's signature series and the core product behind the brand's dominance in Asian markets. Unlike Predator's pursuit of absolute lowest deflection, the EC7 emphasizes the balance between 'feel' and 'low deflection' — the WX700 shaft may not match REVO's deflection numbers, but delivers more natural feedback closer to traditional wood cue experience. The butt craftsmanship is exceptionally refined with near-perfect seam finishing and understated color schemes. The Wavy Joint design provides more coherent power transfer, creating a very 'unified' hit feel. The only downside is the premium pricing compared to competitors.
